creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: stefan
Date: Mon Apr 29 10:33:42 2013
New Revision: 316796
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/316796

Log:
  Unset DEPRECATED - the (master) port is fetchable again.
  
  PR:		176811
  Submitted by:	Yasuhiro KIMURA <yasu@utahime.org>

Modified:
  head/editors/semi-xemacs21-mule/Makefile

Modified: head/editors/semi-xemacs21-mule/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/editors/semi-xemacs21-mule/Makefile	Mon Apr 29 10:26:07 2013	(r316795)
+++ head/editors/semi-xemacs21-mule/Makefile	Mon Apr 29 10:33:42 2013	(r316796)
@@ -13,9 +13,6 @@ PORTCLASS=	slave
 
 MASTERDIR=	${.CURDIR}/../../editors/semi
 
-DEPRECATED=	No more public distfiles
-EXPIRATION_DATE=	2012-10-20
-
 # emacs port setup
 USE_EMACS=	yes
 EMACS_PORT_NAME=	xemacs21-mule
